appShortcutName: User Interface for Elite Dangerous HUD Mod
appDisplayName: User Interface for Elite Dangerous HUD Mod
description:
The purpose of EDHM is to allow players of the game to customize their HUD Colors in many ways. This is estrictly a graphical mod, we dont change any in-game mechanics or things that FDev charges for.


Changelog:
Change Log:
- Fix for Elite Dangerous 4.3.1.0 (Kestrel MKII Update)
Changes:
- Fix for FDev U4.3.1.0 (Kestrel MKII Update)
- Fix Station Menus
- Activation of Color Protection for New Frontline Money Icons, already visible in some Menus, to preserve the Original Color (as was already the case for ARX)
- Attempt to fix certain characters (e.g. "j" and "É") that are displayed in the wrong color in the Comm Panel at screen resolutions higher than 1080p. This is an old and complicated EDHM issue, this fix will be reverted if it is found to cause contamination.
can't currently enter the Stations on foot, so I can't verify that everything is working there, but the Terminals should still be repaired. I can't check the NPC dialogue boxes (I don't think they've been broken).
was able to partially check the status of Odyssey Settlement using the tutorial, and it seems okay.
Installing on Windows:
- Download the installer: edhm-ui-v3-windows-x64.exe from the Assets.
- Run The installer.
- Program will be installed at %LOCALAPPDATA%\EDHM-UI-V3
- Shortcut will be created on Desktop.
Installing on any Linux Distribution:
- Download both edhm-ui-v3-linux-x64.zip and linux_installer.sh from the Assets.
- Place the script next the ZIP file.
- Make the script executable: chmod +x linux_installer.sh
- Run it ./linux_installer.sh
- Program will be installed at '~/.local/share/EDHM-UI-V3'
- Shortcuts will be created on Desktop and Apps List.
